## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- **Title** - Authors. *Venue Year*. [[Paper](URL)]`
- [ ] Placed in the correct section/subsection
- [ ] Sorted by year (newest first)
- [ ] Paper link is valid and accessible
- [ ] No duplicate entries
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_catalog.py` passes
